REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3825 Anza St. San Francisco, Ca 94121)
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for and with Fei Ching (Administrator).

3825 Anza Street, San Francisco:
The sale was confirmed at $1,410,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 27, 2020. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition (subject to receipt of a revised order and the bond). An additional bond is required (please see below).

479 27th Avenue, San Francisco:
The sale was confirmed at $1,250,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 27, 2020. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is required (please see below).

An additional bond in the amount of $660,000.00 (one bond only) is required for both properties.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (472 27th Ave, San Francisco, Ca, 94121)
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3825 Anza St. San Francisco, Ca 94121)
Off Calendar Sep-09-2020 Continued To Sep-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for Fei Ching.

The Court informed Mr. Bresler that the notice of hearing (2) were not posted at the courthouse and that the matters need to be continued. Mr. Bresler requested shortened time for posting. The Court allowed shortened time on posting of the notice of sale. The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (2) are continued to September 16, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (472 27th Ave, San Francisco, Ca, 94121)

Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Continued To Mar-23-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on March 23, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: Anasse. Matter not reported.
